overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves from under a concrete overpass with vibrant pink and blue walls, ascends stairs through a covered walkway, and emerges into a bustling intersection filled with neon signs, futuristic skyscrapers, and pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian path beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near the blue retaining wall

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars
vibrant pink painted concrete wall with smooth surface
bright blue painted concrete wall matching the pink aesthetic
tall palm tree growing from planter under the overpass
ornate black metal street lamp with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic urban setting. The player walks along a pedestrian path flanked by vibrant pink and blue retaining walls. A few NPCs stand conversing near the blue wall while palm trees and street lamps line the walkway. The lighting is mixed with natural sun filtering through and artificial neon glow in the distance.

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs upward through the covered structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs leading up through the overpass structure

entered.detail: wide staircase with red-brown steps ascending under the overpass
massive structural support pillar for the overpass above

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide concrete staircase tucked beneath the overpass structure. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera moves upward through shadows cast by the massive concrete pillars and ceiling. The vibrant walls of the previous area disappear behind as the path leads deeper under the infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with neon signage

events.description: exits the covered overpass into bright open sunlight of the downtown intersection
crossing the busy street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection toward the hotel district with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: curved art-deco style building with large neon HOTEL signage
tall structure displaying glowing green numbers 08
industrial vent releasing white steam into the air
tall traffic signal with pedestrian crossing indicators

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadows of the overpass, the scene opens into a bright, bustling downtown intersection. The camera turns right and crosses the street alongside other pedestrians. A prominent hotel building with neon signage rises on the right, while steam vents and digital billboards fill the background. Vehicles drive through the intersection as the player navigates the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial sidewalk with hotel and billboards

events.description: turning slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve along the hotel building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the hotel and various storefronts with neon displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying PASSION advertisement with face
palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk
red and white striped barriers blocking off a section of sidewalk
large stylized tree in a blue planter box on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the downtown sidewalk, the player passes the hotel building which recedes into the background. The street is lined with palm trees and construction barricades. Large digital billboards including one for PASSION dominate the right side. The camera moves past various pedestrians and approaches a decorative tree in a blue planter.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk area with decorative tree and street performers

events.description: approaching group of NPCs gathered around the tree with protest signs

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of protesters or performers gathered near the decorative tree

notable_agents.action: protester holding a sign and gesturing energetically
seated individual resting against the blue planter

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on a group of NPCs gathered around the decorative tree. One individual holds a sign and gestures while another sits nearby. The hotel and major billboards have passed out of view, leaving the tree and immediate sidewalk as the primary scene elements. The player slows as they approach the group, ending the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into the bright, neon-saturated chaos of a downtown intersection. It begins on a pedestrian path flanked by vibrant pink and blue walls and palm trees, moving steadily forward under the massive urban infrastructure. As the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, shifting through deep shadows cast by heavy pillars before suddenly emerging into the brilliant light of a bustling city center. The scene then expands as the camera crosses a street filled with steam vents, digital billboards, and futuristic vehicles, passing a prominent hotel with glowing signage. Finally, the view glides along a sidewalk lined with construction barricades and large advertisements before slowing to a halt in front of a group of NPCs gathered around a decorative tree in a blue planter.
